# Setup environment scripts

These scripts handle the installation and setup of various desktop environments on Void base image.

### Directory Structure

| Environment   | Directory     | Script    |
| ------------- | ------------- | --------- |
| KDE           | `KDE/mohamed/`| `setup.sh`|
| XFCE          | `XFCE/emadadel/`| `setup.sh`|
| Any other environment | `env/` | `setup.sh`|
